# TASK-XXX: Task Name

| Metadata | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Task ID** | TASK-XXX |
| **Epic** | EP-XXX |
| **Priority** | P0/P1/P2/P3 |
| **Complexity** | S/M/L/XL |
| **Dependencies** | TASK-YYY, TASK-ZZZ |
| **Agent Owner** | Agent Name |
| **Status** | backlog/ready/in_progress/review/done/blocked |

---

## Description

Brief description of what needs to be implemented.

## Inputs

- **From**: List of inputs with sources
- **Source files**: Files to read or modify
- **Data contracts**: Any data schema or interface definitions

## Implementation

Detailed implementation steps:

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

## Outputs

- **Files to create**: List of files
- **Files to modify**: List of existing files to change
- **API contract changes**: Any API changes

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## Test Requirements

- Unit tests for ...
- Integration tests for ...
- Test data needed: ...

## Definition of Done

- All acceptance criteria met
- Tests pass with coverage > 80%
- Type checking passes (mypy --strict)
- Linting passes (ruff)
- Code reviewed
- Task status updated to `done`
